apis.name: MarketData
apis.description: The market data API of MyTestExchange, , with different request data types for websocket and REST endpoints. Remark: Only OBJECT (default) and STRING are usually used, but any data type is supported

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeInt
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using INT response data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeLong
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using LONG response data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeBigDecimal
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using BIGDECIMAL response data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeString
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using STRING response data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeBoolean
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using BOOLEAN response data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeObjectNoParameters
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using OBJECT request data type (implicit), and no parameters

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeObjectOneParameter
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using OBJECT request data type (default, explicit here), and one parameter

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeIntList
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using INT_LIST request data type

restEndpoints.name: postRestRequestDataTypeObjectListMap
restEndpoints.description: A sample REST endpoint using OBJECT_LIST_MAP request data type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithObjectRequestDataTypeZeroParameters
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with OBJECT request type (implicit) and no parameters

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithObjectRequestDataTypeOneParameter
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with OBJECT request type (default, explicit here) and parameter

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithIntRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with INT request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithLongRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with LONG request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithBigDecimalRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with BIGDECIMAL request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithStringRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with STRING request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithBooleanRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with BOOLEAN request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithStringListRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with STRING_LIST request type

websocketEndpoints.name: streamWithObjectListMapRequestDataType
websocketEndpoints.description: Subscribe to stream with OBJECT_LIST_MAP request type. The objectName field is set to a name already defined in other API definition.
